en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 21–27 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 738 kcal/day, peaking 1,562 on Sunday's hike. Saturday (Jun 27) in progress.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −1,152 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Saturday (Jun 27) in progress.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: The hike was the week's peak load
en.i1: Sunday's Zagreb hike was the biggest single session: 11.7 km over 3h17, 1,728 active kcal, avg HR 123 / max 158 — more time-under-load than any gym day this week.
en.i2: Two structured pool swims (Mon 2.2 km, Fri 2.1 km) plus an 873 m open-water swim on Friday. Friday's pool set was the hardest swim — avg 131 / max 158. Combined swim time ran ~5h.
en.i3: Strength on Tue (hack squat), Thu and Sat ran avg HR 114 / 113 / 108, maxes 142 / 154 / 147. Hevy hasn't synced this week's sessions, so lifted volume isn't in yet — next refresh fills it.
en.i4: RHR drifted 53 → 57 across the week and overnight HRV slid from 52 (Sun) to 31 (Sat). Wednesday was the only full rest day. The body is signalling it's time to ease off.
en.rec: A high-volume, endurance-skewed week: a 3h17 Zagreb hike (11.7 km, 1,728 kcal), two structured pool swims (2.2 + 2.1 km) and an 873 m open-water swim, plus three strength sessions (hack squat Tue, Thu, Sat). Active burn totalled 5,167 kcal across seven days. The cost shows in recovery — RHR up 53→57, overnight HRV down to 31 — so the next block should ease off: protect sleep, keep Sunday light (Z2 swim or short hike per plan), and let HRV rebound before the next heavy lift. Hevy hasn't synced this week's lifts yet (tonnage pending); no meals logged after Jun 14, so intake shows the assumed 2,000 plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-21 → 2026-06-27 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 3 treninga snage · Hevy volumen u tijeku
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 21.–27.6. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 738 kcal/dan, vrhunac 1.562 na nedjeljnoj planinarenju. Subota (27.6.) u tijeku.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −1.152 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Subota (27.6.) u tijeku.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Nedjeljno zagrebačko planinarenje bilo je najveći pojedinačni trening: 11,7 km kroz 3h17, 1.728 aktivnih kcal, prosj. puls 123 / maks 158 — više vremena pod opterećenjem nego ijedan dan u teretani.
hr.i2: Dva strukturirana bazenska treninga (pon 2,2 km, pet 2,1 km) plus plivanje na otvorenom 873 m u petak. Petkov bazenski set bio je najteže plivanje — prosj. 131 / maks 158. Ukupno plivanje ~5h.
hr.i3: Snaga u uto (hack squat), čet i sub: prosj. puls 114 / 113 / 108, maks 142 / 154 / 147. Hevy nije sinkronizirao treninge ovog tjedna, pa volumen još nije unesen — sljedeći refresh ga puni.
hr.i4t: Oporavak omekšao kako se opterećenje gomilalo
hr.i4: RHR je porastao 53 → 57 kroz tjedan, a noćni HRV skliznuo s 52 (ned) na 31 (sub). Srijeda je bila jedini potpuni dan odmora. Tijelo signalizira da je vrijeme za usporavanje.
hr.rec: Tjedan velikog volumena nagnut prema izdržljivosti: planinarenje 3h17 (11,7 km, 1.728 kcal), dva strukturirana bazenska treninga (2,2 + 2,1 km) i plivanje na otvorenom 873 m, plus tri treninga snage (hack squat uto, čet, sub). Aktivna potrošnja ukupno 5.167 kcal kroz sedam dana. Cijena se vidi u oporavku — RHR 53→57, noćni HRV pao na 31 — pa sljedeći blok treba olakšati: čuvaj san, neka nedjelja bude lagana (Z2 plivanje ili kratko planinarenje po planu), i pusti HRV da se oporavi prije sljedećeg teškog dizanja. Hevy još nije sinkronizirao dizanja ovog tjedna (tonaža čeka); nema zabilježenih obroka nakon 14.6., pa unos prikazuje pretpostavljenih 2.000.
hr.foot: Podaci: 21.6. → 27.6.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
